rationale.fidelity: Correctly preserves here-and-now allocation, fixed stock, uncertain regional demand, lost demand, no transfers, and expected shortage-plus-holding cost.
rationale.managerial_framing: The concentration-versus-coverage tension and its shortage/leftover pathway are concrete, although the decision trigger and explicit feasible counterfactual are concise.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: No scholarly claim is made, so the conditional category is not triggered.
rationale.evidence_discipline: It labels demand correlation as an assumption and rejects advance demand observation and rebalancing; it could more explicitly flag calibration of the full distribution and costs.
rationale.overall: A compact, faithful managerial framing with no timing or recourse hard failure.
